snippet: Dear Denys, Thank you for your e-mail. The attached document shows me that you have received from Vlaams Woningfonds the amount of 2.250,-€. Can you please send me the document that it has been
subject: RE: Confirmation of Funds Received and Meeting Availability
body:
Dear Denys,

Thank you for your e-mail.
The attached document shows me that you have received from Vlaams Woningfonds the amount of 2.250,-€.
Can you please send me the document that it has been transferred to a blocked account for the apartment?

This Thursday I could meet you at the apartment at 13 o’clock if this works for you?

Kind regards,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B
2970  Schilde
0475/677 696

From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>
Sent: maandag 16 februari 2026 16:09
To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be>
Subject: Confirmation of Funds Received and Meeting Availability

Dear Ms. Worms,

I would like to inform you that the funds from the Vlaams Woningfonds have now been received in the blocked account.

If our meeting on Friday morning remains convenient for you, that would be perfectly fine for me. However, I would also like to mention that I am free this Thursday and could come at any time during the day if that is more suitable for you.

Please let me know what works best.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov
